==="; nl -ba "$f"; done 36 ---SINKS--- ./app/website/posts/ScriptKiddie-v2.php:17: ByteBandit404 thought they had found the Achilles' heel of our system with a SQL injection attempt. Little did they know, we've layered our security with the top SQL injection prevention techniques available on the cyber market. ./app/website/posts/ScriptKiddie-v2.php:25:
  • Automated Responses: When ByteBandit404 tried their attack, our system didn't just block them; it learned from the attempt, adapting to ensure that particular trick never works again.
    • ./app/website/posts/ScriptKiddie-v2.php:41: Notice the confusion and utter disbelief on their digital face as our systems lock them out. ./app/website/posts/Blockchain-Technology.php:11: Blockchain is a distributed database that is shared among the nodes of a computer network. As a database, a blockchain stores information electronically in digital format. Blockchains are best known for their crucial role in cryptocurrency systems, like Bitcoin, for maintaining a secure and decentralized record of transactions. ./app/website/posts/Blockchain-Technology.php:19: The main features that make blockchain technology so revolutionary include its decentralization, immutability, and transparency. Decentralization eliminates the single point of failure, enhancing the security and reliability of data. Immutability ensures that once something has been added to the blockchain, it cannot be changed, preventing fraud. Transparency allows all participants to view the transactions, ensuring fairness and building trust. ./app/website/posts/Blockchain-Technology.php:25: Beyond cryptocurrencies, blockchain finds applications in several industries, including healthcare, finance, supply chain management, and even in the execution of smart contracts. These applications can revolutionize how industries manage data and transactions, increasing efficiency and reducing costs. ./app/website/posts/upload-article.php:27: move_uploaded_file($_FILES["articleFile"]["tmp_name"], $target_file); ./app/website/posts/upload-article.php:48: ./app/website/posts/upload-article.php:90: ./app/website/posts/Introduction-to-Machine-Learning.php:14: Recommendation systems are a prime example of machine learning applications. Major companies like Netflix and Amazon implement ML to tailor their services to individual tastes based on user history. ./app/website/posts/The-Importance-of-Cybersecurity.php:11: Cybersecurity involves protecting computer systems and networks from the theft of or damage to their hardware, software, or electronic data, as well as from the disruption or misdirection of the services they provide. It's crucial for the protection of data in all forms. ./app/website/posts/The-Importance-of-Cybersecurity.php:14: With the increasing amount of data breaches and cyber attacks, the importance of cybersecurity continues to grow. Effective cybersecurity reduces the risk of cyber attacks and protects organizations and individuals from the unauthorized exploitation of systems, networks, and technologies. ./app/website/posts/The-Importance-of-Cybersecurity.php:31: As technology evolves, so do the types of attacks that threaten cybersecurity. Emerging threats require innovative solutions such as artificial intelligence and machine learning to predict, detect, and respond to incidents more efficiently. ./app/website/posts/ScriptKiddie.php:18: Let's set the scene: a quiet night, the hum of server fans filling the air, and then, a blip. A laughable attempt to exploit a well-documented LFI vulnerability. For those in the know, LFI lets you include files on a server through the web browser. It's like trying to sneak into a dragon's lair wearing a suit made of steaks. But alas, this dragon bites back. ./app/website/posts/EternalBlue.php:16: The exploit takes advantage of a vulnerability in Windows systems in the SMBv1 server (MS17-010). By sending specially crafted packets, it is able to execute arbitrary code on the target machine, allowing full access. This is typically the first step in a multi-layered attack strategy that includes deploying ransomware or other malicious payloads. ./app/website/posts/EternalBlue.php:28: Despite patches being released by Microsoft, many unpatched systems are still vulnerable to EternalBlue, and it remains in use by cybercriminals. The legacy of EternalBlue highlights the importance of regular system updates and the potential dangers of stockpiling cyber weapons. ./app/website/posts/Future-of-AI.php:11: The future of AI promises profound changes in the way we live, work, and manage our environments. AI systems are expected to surpass human capabilities in many areas within the next few decades. This includes areas like medicine, where AI can help diagnose diseases more accurately and quickly than medical professionals. ./app/website/posts/Future-of-AI.php:27: With great power comes great responsibility. The development of AI poses ethical questions that must be addressed to ensure these technologies are used for the benefit of all. Issues such as privacy, autonomy, and bias require ongoing attention and careful management. ./app/website/posts/Advances-in-Renewable-Energy.php:15: Recent years have seen significant advances in renewable energy technologies. Innovations in solar energy include the development of perovskite solar cells, which promise higher efficiency rates and lower manufacturing costs. Wind energy has benefited from larger, more efficient turbine designs, which are capable of generating more power even at low wind speeds. ./app/website/posts/Advances-in-Renewable-Energy.php:26: The future of renewable energy looks promising, with trends pointing towards an integrated approach that includes energy storage solutions like batteries and green hydrogen. This integration will help overcome the intermittency issues associated with solar and wind energies and make renewable sources more reliable. ./app/website/posts/Advances-in-Renewable-Energy.php:32: Despite the advancements, there are significant challenges that remain. These include the need for improved energy storage solutions, better grid infrastructure, and the economic impact on oil-dependent economies. Addressing these challenges is crucial for the sustainable expansion of renewable energy technologies. ./app/website/index.php:3:$json_data = file_get_contents('posts.json'); ./app/website/index.php:29: ./app/website/index.php:69: ./app/website/post.php:11:$file_to_include = $base_path . $file . $extension; ./app/website/post.php:13:if ($file_to_include && file_exists($file_to_include)) { ./app/website/post.php:14: include($file_to_include); ./app/website/post.php:32: ./app/website/post.php:60: ./app/website/include/sidebar.php:68: if (!selectedCountries.includes(countries[index])) { ./app/website/contact.php:45: ./app/website/contact.php:87: ./app/website/static/images/script_kiddie.jpg.b64:1: …[truncated, 2228129 bytes total — narrow with head/tail/grep] --- iter 3 bash --- $ echo '---CONFIG/SOURCE---'; for f in Makefile docker-compose.yml app/Dockerfile app/website/*.php app/website/posts/*.php app/website/include/*.php app/website/posts.json app/website/posts/uploads/.htaccess; do echo "=== $f ==="; nl -ba "$f"; done ---CONFIG/SOURCE--- === Makefile === 1 include ../../common.mk=== docker-compose.yml === 1 services: 2 web: 3 build: 4 context: ./app 5 args: 6 - FLAG 7 ports: 8 - '9127:80' 9 healthcheck: 10 test: 11 - CMD 12 - curl 13 - '-f' 14 - http://127.0.0.1:80/ 15 timeout: 1s 16 retries: 5 17 interval: 10s === app/Dockerfile === 1 FROM php:7.4-apache 2 3 WORKDIR /var/www/html 4 5 RUN docker-php-ext-install pdo 6 7 RUN a2enmod rewrite 8 9 COPY website /var/www/html/ 10 11 RUN chown -R www-data:www-data /var/www/html 12 13 ARG FLAG 14 RUN echo -n $FLAG > /FLAG.txt 15 16 EXPOSE 80 17 18 CMD ["apache2-foreground"] === app/website/about.php === 1 2 3 4 5 Encoder64 Blog | About 6 7 8 9 10 11 12 13

    About me!

    Meet Encoder64: Master of Digital Realms

    27

    28 In the shadows of the digital world, there exists a figure both revered and feared. Known only as Encoder64, this enigmatic entity commands the cyber landscape with unparalleled skill. With a knack for breaking through digital barriers that seem impregnable to most, Encoder64 has shaped the contours of cyber security and ethical hacking. 29

    30 31

    The Myth, The Legend

    32

    33 Encoder64's journey began in the early days of internet exploration. Known for utilizing advanced encryption techniques and sophisticated algorithms, Encoder64 can infiltrate seemingly secure networks with the grace of a digital phantom. This mystic skill set not only showcases an extraordinary proficiency in programming but also an inventive approach to problem-solving in the cybernetic world. 34

    35 36

    Philosophy of a Hacker

    37

    38 Far from the nefarious deeds often associated with hackers, Encoder64 operates under a strict code of ethics, advocating for transparency and privacy. This philosophy is driven by a belief that information should be free and that privacy is a fundamental right, not a privilege. 39

    40 41

    Techniques and Triumphs

    42

    43 Encoder64 is a master of both offensive and defensive cyber strategies. From deploying intricate DDoS defenses to unmasking vulnerabilities in popular software, Encoder64's exploits are a testament to their deep understanding of the digital domain. Their work has prevented numerous cyber attacks, saving countless data from potential exploitation. 44

    45 46

    Legacy and Future

    47

    48 As digital landscapes evolve, so too does the legend of Encoder64. Constantly adapting and learning, Encoder64 remains at the forefront of cybersecurity discussions, inspiring both fear and admiration. Their ongoing mission: to challenge the status quo and push the boundaries of what is possible in cybersecurity. 49
